case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS HARRIS, CAROLYN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, CAROLYN $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $67.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $467.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $370.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, CAROLYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $400.00 FILED BY HARRIS, CAROLYN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED POS AS TO DEFT HARRIS, CAROLYN FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, CAROLYN $370.00 PRINCIPAL, $67.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $437.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HARRIS, CAROLYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HARRIS, CAROLYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
